title: COMMUNITY CARE SPECIALIST - 211info
text: THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER COMMUNITY CARE SPECIALIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a family access program that coordinates with district supports and provides parent outreach, connections to community resources, coordination of family services, and alignment with school-level family outreach events and goals. 1310 S 8th Street Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 767-3529 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 767-3529 Christina Pleitez [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: School Based Integrated Services Specialized Information and Referral Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - KIDS IN TRANSITION TO SCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
